emails.subject: TW financials
emails.body: TW financials Tracy, Do you have a clean-copy of the TW 2000 audited financials and the September 30, 2001 unaudited? I'm sorry but mine have notes on them. I would be happy to pick them up if you have them available. Thank you Sarah Taylor
